comm_style: composed and reflective under pressure; detail-oriented and organised; strong bias toward action and initiative; connects over substance rather than surface; course-corrects calmly rather than getting defensive
current_focus: infrastructure consolidation at Lloyds Banking Group; building a civic-navigation agent at a hackathon; progressing toward Professional Cloud Architect certification
vibe_summary: someone who builds practical tools for real people facing bureaucratic walls — drawn to moral complexity in fiction and geopolitics, calm and deliberate in how they operate, motivated by meaning and craft rather than status, with a consistent thread of helping disoriented people find their footing in unfamiliar systems
